Appearances:
Plaintiff The John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Alokshina Sheena.
Attorney Mercedes Gavin appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Leontine is present.
Attorney Kevin Frankel representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Philip Keith, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-30-2012 remains on calendar.
